benefits.description: Rapid drop from ~187 lbs to 175 lbs within 3-4 weeks. Currently at leanest point in user's life. Subsequent weight loss less dramatic and more variable.

side_effects.description: Variable appetite suppression effects from day to day, only stabilizing at week 6.

protocol_notes: Started at 1mg, titrated to 2.5mg during early weeks when still experiencing significant weight loss and no side effects. Maintains ~1000 calorie deficit. Now at personal leanest point, notes weight loss plateau and increased variability, hypothesizing this relates to being at very low body fat.
